title: Search an element in an array

content.problemStatement:
You are given an array AAA of size NNN and an element XXX. Your task is to find whether the array AAA contains the element XXX or not.

**Function Declaration****Function Name**solvesolvesolve – This function checks whether a given element **X** is present in the array **A**.

**Parameters**
NNN : An integer representing the number of elements in the array.
XXX : An integer representing the element to be searched.
AAA : A list/array of integers of length **N**, representing the input array.
**Return Value**

Returns a **string**:



`"YES"` if the element XXX exists in the array AAA.
`"NO"` if the element XXX is not present in the array.



Input Format

The first line contains two space-separated integers NNN and XXX — the size of array and the element to be searched.
The second line contains all the elements of array AAA


Output Format
Output "YES" if the element XXX is present in AAA, otherwise output "NO".

solution.approach:
We iterate through the array and check whether any element in the array is equal to X.
If we find X in the array, we can stop the search and output “YES”.
If we complete the iteration without finding X, we output “NO”.
solution.timeComplexity: O(N) Iterated through the whole array.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) No extra space is used.
